svg.text: Bed A Reservoir & Soil Layering System
Longitudinal cross-section through Bed A (230cm long x 40cm tall) | Not to scale vertically

g.text: Top growing layer. Roots live here. 15-20cm.
Blocks soil from entering gravel. Lets water wick up.
Pond liner + gravel + 6 PVC pipes. Holds 25-35L water. 8cm.
Coarse 16-32mm gravel. Free-draining to grass below. 8-10cm.
Waterproof bathtub. Only in north zone. Dam at L=120.
